$comment: DataCite Metadata Schema 4.4 (JSON representation). Machine-readable counterpart of Record 2 in ../METADATA.md.

creators.name: NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information (NCEI)

titles.title: Daily Summaries — Central Park, NY (Station USW00094728), Jan–Aug 2025

publisher: NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information (NCEI)

dates.dateInformation: Snapshot download date used by this project; NOAA corrects observations retroactively

geoLocations.geoLocationPlace: Central Park, Manhattan, New York City, USA

rightsList.rights: US federal government work, not copyrightable domestically (17 U.S.C. § 105); NCEI additionally applies CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication to its holdings.
rightsList.$comment: NCEI's own stated CC0 policy: https://www.ncei.noaa.gov/archive

descriptions.description: 243 rows (one per calendar day, no gaps), 4 variables retained (TMAX, TMIN, PRCP, SNOW), units=metric requested explicitly. See ../data_dictionary_weather.md for the full column-level schema.

relatedIdentifiers.$comment: Reserved Zenodo Sandbox DOI for this project's derived joined dataset (Record 3 / record_analysis_daily.json), which this source feeds into. Sandbox DOI: does not resolve on real doi.org.
